# Nasun

> A new Layer 1 blockchain with sub-second finality, built on a Sui fork. Nasun powers a unified onchain ecosystem: DEX, prediction markets, AI compliance settlement, and gaming.

## Core Products

- [Pado](https://nasun.io/ecosystem/pado): Unified onchain finance — DEX, prediction markets, lottery, and margin trading on Nasun Network.
- [Baram](https://nasun.io/ecosystem/baram): AI Compliance Settlement Layer — automated regulatory enforcement for onchain transactions using TEE-based AI agents.
- [GenSol / Spectra](https://nasun.io/ecosystem/gensol): Onchain gaming studio — Spectra is a competitive team-based FPS built on Nasun.

## Network

- Chain: Nasun Network (Sui fork, Chain ID 272218f1)
- Consensus: Sub-second finality
- RPC: https://rpc.devnet.nasun.io
- Explorer: https://explorer.nasun.io/devnet
- Native Token: NASUN (smallest unit: SOE)

## Wave 1 Campaign

- [Battalion NFT](https://nasun.io/wave1/battalion-nft): Free mint allowlist — connect X account, complete tasks, secure your spot.
- [Leaderboard](https://nasun.io/wave1/leaderboard): Community engagement leaderboard with point-based ranking.

## Links

- Website: https://nasun.io
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/Nasun_io
- Discord: https://discord.gg/nasun
